summary: E2E testing of Addrika checkout flow with self-pickup feature. All features tested and verified: Delivery mode selection, Self-pickup store dropdown, Time slots, Rs.11 token payment, MRP pricing in UI, Coupon codes only for shipping, Find Retailers page with test emails.

minor.issue: Products API returns discounted prices (105/380) while frontend uses MRP (110/402). Frontend uses mockData.js for display which has correct MRP prices. Not a breaking issue as checkout calculates from MRP.

delivery_mode_selection.self_pickup: Shows 'No shipping charges - Pay at store option'

delhi_store.name: M.G. Shoppie
delhi_store.address: 745 Sector 17 Pocket A Phase II, Dwarka, South West Delhi

bhagalpur_store.name: Mela Stores
bhagalpur_store.address: D.N. Singh Road, Variety Chowk, Bhagalpur

pickup_time_slots.validation: Shows 'Please select a pickup time slot' error if not selected

token_payment.option: Pay ₹11 Token Now, Rest at Store
token_payment.description: Reserve your order with ₹11 token - Pay ₹99 at pickup

full_payment.description: Complete payment online - Just show order ID at store

mrp_pricing.note: Frontend mockData.js shows MRP prices. Backend products.py still has 5% discount (105/380) but checkout uses MRP for calculations

discount_codes_shipping_only.shipping_mode: Shows discount code input with 'Have a discount code?' and available hints
discount_codes_shipping_only.pickup_mode: Discount code section HIDDEN when self-pickup selected

shipping_tiers.verified_message: Add ₹139 more for reduced shipping (₹49) - shown for ₹110 cart

find_retailers_page.map: Leaflet map with store markers working
find_retailers_page.buttons: View on Map, WhatsApp, Email buttons working

action_items: OPTIONAL: Sync backend products.py prices to match MRP (110/402) for consistency. Currently frontend uses mockData.js with correct MRP prices.
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.jsx correctly implements delivery mode selection with data-testid attributes for testing
Self-pickup flow properly hides discount codes and shows token payment option
Time slots are hardcoded in frontend (PICKUP_TIME_SLOTS array) - working correctly
Retailer emails in shipping_config.py correctly use test emails for both stores
Order creation API includes pickup_time_slot field in payment session and order documents
seed_data_creation: Created test user: test.checkout@example.com for checkout flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete checkout flow with self-pickup feature verified. Login required for checkout. Test user test.checkout@example.com created. Retailer test emails: Delhi=amitkumar.911@proton.me, Bhagalpur=mr.amitbgp@gmail.com. All time slots and payment options working. Razorpay integration requires actual payment for full E2E test.
